task_completion.description: Verify that Oracle Analytics Desktop is open and the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with 'Sample Order Lines' visible in the Data Elements panel on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Box Plot visualization has been selected or created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Box Plot icon selected in the visualization type menu or a box plot rendering on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Product Sub Category' is assigned to the Category (X-axis).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Product Sub Category' data element placed in the 'Category' or 'X-axis' drop zone in the grammar panel next to the visualization.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Profit' is assigned to the Values (Y-axis).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Profit' data element placed in the 'Values' or 'Y-axis' drop zone in the grammar panel next to the visualization.

task_completion.description: Verify that the visualization title is set to 'Profit Distribution by Sub-Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Profit Distribution by Sub-Category' at the top of the chart on the canvas or in the title properties panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'ProfitBoxPlot.dva' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' and the filename 'ProfitBoxPlot', or the application title bar displaying 'ProfitBoxPlot'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (clicking menus, dragging and dropping fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the visualization is genuinely rendered by the analytics software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should appear within the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas workspace, not as a static image opened in an image viewer or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply create a dummy file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like Notepad) open where the agent is manually typing out a fake .dva file structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected visualization is a Box Plot. The X-axis (Category) must be 'Product Sub Category' and the Y-axis (Values) must be 'Profit'. The visualization title must be exactly 'Profit Distribution by Sub-Category'. The final file must be saved as 'ProfitBoxPlot.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'.
